objectives.description_en: Survive and extract from Woods through Bridge V-Ex
objectives.description_ko: 삼림에서 Bridge V-Ex를 통해 생존하고 탈출하기
objectives.description_ja: WoodsからBridge V-Exを通って生還し、脱出する

objectives.description_en: Survive and extract from Customs through Dorms V-Ex

objectives.description_ja: CustomsからDorms V-Exを通って生き残り、脱出する

objectives.description_ja: Ground ZeroからPolice Cordon V-Exを通って生き残り、脱出する

objectives.description_en: Locate and mark the first Patrol-A armored vehicle with an MS2000 Marker on Streets of Tarkov

objectives.description_ja: Streets of TarkovでMS2000マーカーを使って最初のPatrol-A装甲車を探し、マークする
